title: Ritsuko in episode 20
wikitext:
[]: Ritsuko in episode 20.             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Thu Apr 14, 2011 8:33 am Clarify something for me. At the end of episode 20, right before the Misato/Kaji bedroom scene, there's a scene of Misato dropping Ritsuko off... somewhere, and then the latter musing about Misato going to meet a man. Then she looks off to the side and reproaches herself with something like a wistful smile. ("As soon as Shinji's safety is confirmed, she's off to meet a guy. I shouldn't talk." - at least in some random sub I pulled off the net.) What exactly does this mean? When I rewatched the series a while ago, I got the strong impression there that Ritsuko was going to meet Gendo, but I'm not sure this makes sense. Assuming Misato took her home, Gendo could be there for an evening of lurid sex or something, but Ritsuko invites Misato for drinks in the car, and why would she do that if she had other plans? On the other hand, her line - at least in translation - kind of implies she's going to meet a man herself. So what's going on there?

[]: Re: Ritsuko in episode 20.             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Apr 14, 2011 8:39 am BornIn1142 wrote: When I rewatched the series a while ago, I got the strong impression there that Ritsuko was going to meet Gendo, but I'm not sure this makes sense. Assuming Misato took her home, Gendo could be there for an evening of lurid sex or something, but Ritsuko invites Misato for drinks in the car, and why would she do that if she had other plans? On the other hand, her line - at least in translation - kind of implies she's going to meet a man herself. So what's going on there?

[]: Re: Ritsuko in episode 20.             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Apr 14, 2011 8:57 am BornIn1142 wrote: When I rewatched the series a while ago, I got the strong impression there that Ritsuko was going to meet Gendo, but I'm not sure this makes sense. -

[]: Re: Ritsuko in episode 20.             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Thu Apr 14, 2011 9:05 am symbv wrote: What made you get that impression? At least such thought never crossed my mind...

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Thu Apr 14, 2011 9:07 am it means that ritsuko was jealous, and she wished that Misato and her could have a girls-only-night in a motel, but instead Misato chose Kaji over herself, she is dissapointed, and unsatisfied

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 14, 2011 9:24 am These are the Platinum subtitles: ADV Platinum (Renewal) Episode 20 wrote: Misato (OFF): See you! RITSUKO: Going on a tryst with a man the moment she knows that Shinji is safe? I guess I'm in no position to talk.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Apr 14, 2011 9:33 am I guess what Ritsuko said could also be interpreted as she was going to do the same as what Misato went off to do *in the same day*, but there is no clear evidence that Ritsuko/Gendou tryst had to be on the same day as Misato went to see Kaji. I prefer to interpret it as a general comment from Ritsuko on Misato's behavior and attitude, which Ritsuko both detested and shared, making it a very good character study of Ritsuko just by that short phrase she uttered.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Apr 14, 2011 2:25 pm juaxoo wrote: it means that ritsuko was jealous, and she wished that Misato and her could have a girls-only-night in a motel, but instead Misato chose Kaji over herself, she is dissapointed, and unsatisfied

Article: Ritsuko in episode 20
[]: Ritsuko in episode 20.             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Thu Apr 14, 2011 8:33 am Clarify something for me. At the end of episode 20, right before the Misato/Kaji bedroom scene, there's a scene of Misato dropping Ritsuko off... somewhere, and then the latter musing about Misato going to meet a man. Then she looks off to the side and reproaches herself with something like a wistful smile. ("As soon as Shinji's safety is confirmed, she's off to meet a guy. I shouldn't talk." - at least in some random sub I pulled off the net.) What exactly does this mean? When I rewatched the series a while ago, I got the strong impression there that Ritsuko was going to meet Gendo, but I'm not sure this makes sense. Assuming Misato took her home, Gendo could be there for an evening of lurid sex or something, but Ritsuko invites Misato for drinks in the car, and why would she do that if she had other plans? On the other hand, her line - at least in translation - kind of implies she's going to meet a man herself. So what's going on there?
